compiled_state.title: Add eval test case asserting no Figma artifacts when flag is absent
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add a test case to plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml with a scenario where design.figma_collaboration is absent or false. The test must assert that the skill generates NO Figma-specific artifacts: no Figma SVG requirements, no .gitignore *.png, no design:awaiting_import tag, no instructions comment.

### Files to modify
- Edit: plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

## TDD Requirement
The test case verifies opt-out behavior. Run run-skill-evals.sh to confirm it passes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Eval config contains opt-out test case
  Verify: grep -q 'figma_collaboration.*false\|without.*flag\|opt.out\|no.*Figma' plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] run-skill-evals.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md
